package rulecoverage

func NegativeFmtPrintOfSensitiveStruct() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_print_of_sensitive_struct"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%+v\", user)` or `fmt.Printf(\"%v\", config)` on structs that contain password/secret/token fields"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
